messages.subject: [R-jobs] Project based in US for a Data Scientist
messages.subject_clean: [R-jobs] Project based in US for a Data Scientist
messages.body_plain:
Dear community,

We are searching for a freelance data scientist to engage with a top
telecom consulting firm for 4 months. Location is based in the US but can
be done remotely.

Both consulting firms and end clients are great teams and have deep data
science expertise.

Link to the opportunity:

https://www.outvise.com/walls/opportunity/13x320065

If interested please maul me: ellensa at outvise.com

Thank you,

Eusebi.

-- 


*EUSEBI LLENSA EISINGER*
CEO & Co-Founder
(+34) 670 774 964
ellensa at outvise.com | *www.outvise.com* <http://www.outvise.com/>

-- 
In compliance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 and Law 34/2002, (LSSICE), we 
inform you that the personal data contained in this email will be part of a 
File belonging to Outvise, S.L., whose purpose is to manage communications 
and the sending of advertising or commercial information, either because of 
your relationship with us or because you have authorised us to have your 
personal data included in such file. This data will be processed and 
retained as confidential, by applying the relevant security measures and 
for the period required to provide our services or, failing that, for the 
period required by law. The data provided will not be disclosed to any 
third party except as may be required by applicable law. As a Data Subject, 
you may at any time exercise the right of access, rectification, erasure, 
restriction of the processing, as well as the right to data portability or 
object to processing by writing to Outvise, S.L., with Tax Identification 
No. B66335947 and registered office at C/ Milanesat, 6, 08017 - Barcelona, 
or by email at support at outvise.com <mailto:support at outvise.com>, together 
with a proof of identity. This email message is intended solely for the 
recipient(s) referred to therein. The information therein contained may be 
confidential and/or private, so its reproduction or dissemination is 
strictly prohibited. If you are not the intended recipient of this message, 
please return it immediately to the mailing address and destroy it.

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
